name: Verify Answer
description: Always include an explicit verification step after reaching an answer
content: Verification requirement: After reaching your final answer, always include an explicit verification step. For math: substitute back into the original equation or differentiate the antiderivative. For graph problems: check that the result satisfies all problem constraints (e.g., all nodes visited, shortest path property). For code/algorithms: trace through with the given input and confirm the output matches. Label this section "Verification:" clearly.
